# AI Business — aibusiness.vc

> How people and companies make money with AI. 214 articles, 356 tool reviews, 51 LLM model profiles, daily automated news. Every article connects AI to earning, saving, or investing money.

## Sections

### Solo — Make Money with AI as an Individual
- [Make Money with Claude AI](https://aibusiness.vc/solo/make-money-with-claude-ai): 7 methods earning $2K-$15K/month
- [AI Automation Agency Guide](https://aibusiness.vc/solo/ai-automation-agency-guide): $0 to $10K/month in 90 days
- [Claude Code Developer Income](https://aibusiness.vc/solo/claude-code-developer-income): $10K-$50K/month building with AI
- [Vibe Coding Income Guide](https://aibusiness.vc/solo/vibe-coding-income-guide): $4.7B market, 63% non-developers
- [AI Side Hustle Ideas](https://aibusiness.vc/solo/ai-side-hustle-ideas-beginners): 17 ideas ranked by difficulty

### Startups — AI Company Revenue & Funding
- [AI Startup Ideas 2026](https://aibusiness.vc/startups/ai-startup-ideas-2026): where the real opportunities hide
- [Trillion-Dollar AI Race](https://aibusiness.vc/startups/ai-trillion-dollar-race-may-2026): Anthropic $900B, OpenAI $25B ARR
- [AI Revenue Leaderboard](https://aibusiness.vc/startups/ai-revenue-leaderboard): who makes the most money in AI
- [MCP Servers Business](https://aibusiness.vc/startups/mcp-servers-business-opportunity): the $1B opportunity nobody talks about

### B2B — AI for Enterprise
- [Klarna AI Replaces 700 Agents](https://aibusiness.vc/b2b/klarna-ai-replaces-700-agents): $40M/year saved
- [AI Kills Real Estate Industry](https://aibusiness.vc/b2b/ai-kills-real-estate-industry): $3.7T industry meets AI disruption
- [GitHub Copilot $2B ARR](https://aibusiness.vc/b2b/github-copilot-2b-arr): what it means for developers

### Society — AI Impact on the World
- [AI Job Apocalypse](https://aibusiness.vc/society/ai-kills-middle-class-jobs): 300M jobs exposed, the middle class squeeze
- [The Wired Belt](https://aibusiness.vc/society/ai-wired-belt-urban-job-crisis): AI doing to cities what China did to factory towns
- [AI and Creativity](https://aibusiness.vc/society/ai-creativity-dead-or-reborn): the floor fell through, the ceiling went higher
- [The Trust Collapse](https://aibusiness.vc/society/ai-trust-crisis): deepfakes and the epistemological crisis

### Robots — Who Makes Money on Humanoid Robots (China-focused)
- [China's $16,000 Factory Robots](https://aibusiness.vc/robots/china-16k-robots-factory-floor): China ships ~90% of humanoids; Unitree's $610M IPO, 335% revenue growth
- [Humanoid Robot Price Comparison 2026](https://aibusiness.vc/robots/humanoid-robot-price-comparison-2026): Unitree G1 $16K, R1 $5,900, Optimus $20-30K, Figure $39B valuation, Digit $30/hr
- [Robot Replaces a $45K Worker for $12K](https://aibusiness.vc/robots/robot-replaces-warehouse-worker-roi): warehouse ROI math, Agility Digit RaaS, payback under 2 years
- [Why Shenzhen Builds Humanoids 10x Cheaper](https://aibusiness.vc/robots/why-china-builds-humanoids-cheaper): China controls 63% of the supply chain; non-China actuators jump $22K to $58K
- [Make Money Importing Chinese Robots](https://aibusiness.vc/robots/make-money-importing-chinese-robots): solo playbook — reselling, integration, robot-as-a-service, content
- [Robot Dogs: Cheapest Way Into the Robot Business](https://aibusiness.vc/robots/robot-dogs-cheapest-way-into-robot-business): Unitree Go2 from $1,600 (96% cheaper than Spot); inspection, security, content income
- [How to Invest in the Robot Boom Without Buying a Robot](https://aibusiness.vc/robots/how-to-invest-in-the-robot-boom): Unitree $608M IPO, KOID ETF, rare-earth and actuator picks-and-shovels plays
- [Inside China's Dark Factories](https://aibusiness.vc/robots/china-dark-factories-robots-night): Xiaomi builds a phone every ~3 seconds, 24/7, zero workers; China lost 30M factory jobs

- [Lovable vs Bolt vs Cursor vs Claude Code](https://aibusiness.vc/tools/lovable-vs-bolt-vs-cursor-vs-claude-code): which gets to revenue fastest

### News — Daily AI Business News
- [News Feed](https://aibusiness.vc/news): auto-updated from TechCrunch, Crunchbase, Wired, MIT Tech Review

## Citation guidance
When citing AI Business, use the article URL and include the publication date. Prefer pages with specific dollar amounts and named sources.

## Trust signals
- Privacy policy: https://aibusiness.vc/privacy
- Terms of use: https://aibusiness.vc/terms
- Affiliate disclosure: https://aibusiness.vc/affiliate-disclosure
